title: NGS Library Prep Part 1: PCR Setup I
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol performs part 1 of...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs part 1 of a custom NGS library prep workflow: PCR Prep 1. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `track tips across protocol runs`: If set to `yes`, tip racks will be assumed to be in the same state that they were in the previous run. For example, if one completed protocol run accessed tips through column 5 of the 3rd tiprack, the next run will access tips starting at column 6 of the 3rd tiprack. If set to `no`, tips will be picked up from column 1 of the 1st tiprack. ---

steps.title: 15µl of mastermix is pre-added from...
steps.instruction: 15µl of mastermix is pre-added from the first column of the reagent plate to all wells of the PCR plate using the same set of tips.

steps.title: 10µl of each sample is transferred...
steps.instruction: 10µl of each sample is transferred from the sample plate to the corresponding well of the PCR plate with pre-added mastermix. New tips are used for each transfer.
